title: Wand
body:
This is a mod which has a wand which on right click summons a fireball and plays the voldemort avadacadavra sound. along with the command /e which plays the E sound.

 All is showcased here:
 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=n8cFuDVDjiE

 Note: if you ever need any help with any mods, Feel free to join my discord server linked under the mod or here: https://discord.gg/wduJqK6nCW
